content:
Another set of memories from the First Ever Club Day of STI College Davao! From exciting competitions to fun-filled activities and club showcases, our STIers truly showed their passion, creativity, and teamwork.

Thank you to everyone who made this milestone event successful and memorable!

📸 : Cherry Jane Villasencio
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Mabuhay and Madayaw, STIers! 

Take a look at the highlights from the First Ever Club Day of STI College Davao! From performances and competitions to games and club activities, this event showcased the talent, creativity, and unity of our student community. Truly a day to remember for every club! 

📸 : Cherry Jane Villasencio
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
The celebration continues! 

Belated Happy Birthday to our SSC Auditor. Your hard work and dedication behind the scenes never go unnoticed. Wishing you a year filled with success and great moments ahead!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
The beginning of a new journey. 

This video documentation captures the first moments of FeSTIventure—where passion, adventure, and community come together. This is only the first chapter, and many more memories are waiting to be created.

Video & Editing: Chester Paul Villasencio
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
ARMONYX FESTIVAL BOOTH IS READY!

STIers! The First Ever Club Day is coming and Armonyx Club is bringing the festival vibes to life!

Visit our booth and enjoy fun, music, and creativity all in one place:

🎵 Request a Song
Call the tune and feel the vibe! You can sing it yourself or let the talented Armonyx singers perform it for you.

🎨 Face Paint Station
Flash your colors and turn your festival energy into bold and creative face art.

🎸 Customized Album Bracelets
Wear your music! Create bracelets inspired by your favorite albums and artists.

Bring your friends, enjoy the music, and celebrate art with us!

📍 Greenheights Gym, Buhangin Diversion, Davao City
📅 March 13, 2026 (Friday)

Come visit the ARMONYX Booth and let’s make Club Day unforgettable!

#ARMONYX #STIClubDay #FestivalVibes #MusicAndArts
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Club Day Venue

The celebration continues this March 13 (Friday) at Greenheights Gym, Buhangin Diversion, Davao City!

Get ready for a day filled with club booths, competitions, games, and amazing performances as we celebrate the First Ever Club Day.

Venue Location:
Greenheights Gym, Buhangin Diversion

Google Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/jYueXJqQcDp8MUSv8
See you there!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
A Milestone for Every Club.

This March 13, we celebrate the First Ever Club Day — a special event dedicated to recognizing the dedication, creativity, and leadership that every club brings to our student community. Each organization plays an important role in building a vibrant campus where talents grow and leadership shines.

Join us as we honor the efforts and achievements of our student organizations and the people behind them.

Together, we lead. Together, we celebrate.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Two hearts, one special bond, and twice the celebration.

Happy 18th Birthday to our wonderful twins! May your debut mark the beginning of brighter dreams, endless opportunities, and unforgettable memories together.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Happy 18th Birthday to our wonderful twins!.webp

content:
In times of hardship, the STIer spirit shines the brightest.

Several families in Davao City, including members of our STI College Davao community, are facing the heartbreaking aftermath of recent fire incidents. As one family, we rise together.

The Supreme Student Council of STI College Davao calls on all STIers to extend a helping hand through our Donation Drive. Your simple act of kindness—whether clothes, food, or hygiene essentials—can make a meaningful difference in helping our fellow students recover and rebuild.

Drop-off point: Lobby of STI College Davao / SSC Office

Let us stand united, embody compassion, and prove that the true strength of an STIer lies in bayanihan.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Every booth had its own magic — sweet vows at the Wedding Booth, picture-perfect memories at the Photo Booth, thrilling challenges at the Game Booth, and hilarious moments at the Jail Booth. The joy and laughter from the students made it all worthwhile. This event was truly a celebration of fun, friendship, and Valentastic vibes. 💍🩷
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: February 13 was definitely one for the books! 🎉 The STI Bazaar brought together amazing food, creative booths, loud laughs, and unforgettable memories. From exciting games to delicious treats and endless bonding moments, the day was filled with color, energy, and school spirit. So grateful to everyone who made the STI Bazaar such a huge success! 💛✨
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Valentastic 2026 was more than just a celebration — it was a whole experience. From strolling through the colorful bazaars to exploring the creative departmental booths, every corner had something special waiting. Ending the night at the cinema with laughter and sweet moments? Absolutely perfect. 🎬
Love, fun, and unforgettable memories all in one place. Valentastic 2026 gave us vibrant bazaars, aesthetic departmental booths, cute little surprises, and a cinema moment that felt straight out of a rom-com. Truly a day that had everything. 💘🌸
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Happy ValentaSTIc Day! 💘✨ Today we celebrate friendship, laughter, and the joy of being together on campus. Enjoy the fun-filled activities, share smiles with your friends, and create memories that will last long after today. Let’s make every moment special and fill the day with happiness, love, and unforgettable experiences!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Step into the animated world of ValentaSTIc Day! 💘✨ This special animation showcases the exciting events and vibrant moments waiting for everyone this February 13 — a sneak peek of the fun, laughter, and love filling the celebration. Don't miss the experience as everything comes to life on screen!
✂️ Edited by: Matthew Albenio
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Dress to express this ValentaSTIc Day! 💘✨ Follow our color-coded dress theme and let your outfit speak for you as we celebrate love, friendship, and fun this February 13. Wear your colors proudly and join the campus in a vibrant day full of energy and connection! 🎉💗
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Congratulations to our Newly Elected SSC Officers for the term 2025 – 2026! 🎉

We are proud to present the newly elected leaders who will serve and represent the student body with dedication and passion:

 President: Chester Paul Villasencio
Vice President (Internal): Chesilyn Dianne Tabigue
Vice President (External): Cj Love Marie Astudillo

Your leadership marks the beginning of a new chapter filled with opportunities, growth, and unity. Together, let us support our SSC Officers as they embark on their journey of service for the student community. 💙✨
author: SSC Admin

content: STIers, it's exam season! Time to show the results of your hard work, late nights, and dedication. October 1-4, 2025: SHS 1st Periodical & Tertiary Midterm Exams. Exam Essentials: Ballpen, Exam Permit, Prayer, and of course, a GOOD LUCK from your fave person. 'Commit to the Lord whatever you do, and your plans will succeed.' - Proverbs 16:3. REMINDER: Review your notes, study hard, and keep growing. Whatever the result, your worth is more than grades. Good luck, STIers! Let's ace these exams together!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Share this lucky coquettlog para iwas itlog sa Exams! As you face your exams this week STIers, here's a little sprinkle of luck. But remember, luck favors those who prepare, and we know you've done the work. So trust yourself, breathe, and let your hard work pay off.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Share this Lucky Coquettlog for Exams.webp

content: STIers, let us extend our compassion and support. Recent fire incidents in various areas of Davao City have left several families, including some of our fellow STI College Davao students, with the total loss of their homes and belongings. The Supreme Student Council is spearheading a Donation Drive to provide aid to those affected. Donations may be dropped off at the lobby of STI College Davao. We are accepting: Clothes, Food, Hygiene Kits. Your generosity, no matter how small, will bring comfort and hope to our fellow STIers as they begin to rebuild their lives. Together, let us uphold the true spirit of bayanihan.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Donation Drive for Davao Fire Victims.webp

content:
𝐃𝐚𝐰𝐠, 𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐢𝐬 𝐨𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐨𝐧 𝐀𝐢𝐫𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐞 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐤 — 𝐢𝐭'𝐬 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡 𝐁𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐤!
It's not just the body that gets tired — the mind and heart need rest too. That's why we're putting school on pause to recharge, reset, and breathe. 🧘♀️✨
So take this week to:
💤 Catch up on sleep
💧 Stay hydrated
🚫 Mute the stress and toxic vibes
𝗦𝗲𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗢𝗰𝘁 𝟭𝟯! ✨ 𝗦𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗹 𝘁𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗱, 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗼 𝗮𝘁 𝗹𝗲𝗮𝘀𝘁 𝘄𝗲𝗹𝗹-𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝘁𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗱. 🤣❤️
👩🏻💻: 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐲 𝐉𝐚𝐧𝐞 𝐕𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐨
✍🏻: 𝐑𝐢𝐳𝐳𝐚 𝐉𝐨𝐲 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐳

content: Today, the STI College Davao Supreme Student Council (SSC), together with the HTM, SHS and ICT departments, supportive teachers, and our compassionate students, reached out to the fire victims in Brgy. 21-C Piapi through a heartfelt donation drive. We sincerely thank all STIers who contributed clothes, food, and sanitary needs. Your generosity made this act of service possible and brought hope to those affected.

content: National Teacher's Month to all our modern-day heroes! Through your guidance, passion, and dedication, you help us reach heights we never thought possible. You inspire us to dream bigger, try harder, and believe in ourselves even when things get tough. You don't just teach lessons inside the classroom—you teach life. Your passion lights the way, your support gives us strength, and your belief in us builds our confidence. You spark curiosity, shape character, and mold the leaders and dreamers of tomorrow. This Teachers' Month, we celebrate you—the heroes who shape minds and inspire hearts. Your sacrifices, energy, and love never go unnoticed. You are the reason the future shines brighter. Thank you for everything you do. The world is truly better because of you.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: WE'RE LOOKING FOR NEW SSC STAFF! Are you responsible, dedicated, and willing to take the initiative? The Supreme Student Council is looking for 10 passionate and reliable staff members to join our team! Be part of an organization that values teamwork, leadership, and service. This is your chance to grow, contribute, and make a difference within our STI community! Note: We will be prioritizing male applicants to help strengthen our manpower for upcoming events and activities. If you're ready to take on the challenge, send us a message or approach any SSC officer to apply!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: STIers, it's your time to shine! Get your gear on and show us your artistic interpretation of this school year's Tagisan ng Sining theme. SHUTTER'S BEST (Photography Competition) - THEME: BORROWED LIGHT. In what way does light transform an ordinary place into something special? Competition Date: October 15, 2025, Time: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM, Venue: STI College Davao. You'll be using your own digital camera. This event is open to all Senior High School and Tertiary students. Registration is still open!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: CLASS ADVISORY: Please be informed that all classes will be conducted through the Synchronous Learning Modality (Online) from October 14-17, 2025, via Microsoft Teams, following your regular class schedules. Students are advised to check their ELMS subject pages for the meeting links. Teachers may also send a direct invitation through MS Teams prior to the start of the class. Kindly ensure that you are logged in on time and ready for your sessions. Let's continue to stay engaged and make the most out of our online learning experience while ensuring everyone's safety and convenience.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Get ready to scream, laugh, and make history at STI's very first Halloween celebration! Join us for an afternoon of ghoulish games, thrilling booths, spooky costumes, and cinematic scares! Date: October 29, 2025 (Wednesday), Time: 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM, Venue: STI Multipurpose Hall (Rooms 302-304). Department Booths: Rooms 401-403, Fright Night Cinema: Rooms 101-103. Come dressed in your spookiest, funniest, or most creative costume — you might just win a prize! Gather your friends, summon your school spirit, and let's make this Halloween one to remember!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: MEMORANDUM NOTICE - Heads up, STIers! Attendance for our Teacher's Day Celebration on October 24, 2025 (1:00 PM - 5:00 PM) at the STI Multipurpose Hall (Rooms 302-304) is MANDATORY for all students. Department Secretaries and Class Presidents will monitor attendance, so make sure to be present and on time. Let's all take part in honoring our amazing teachers and making this celebration a success!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Dress Code Advisory for Teacher's Day Celebration on October 24, 2025. You are encouraged and authorized to wear any official STI-branded shirt or uniform top, such as your PE, NYC, or NSTP shirts. IMPORTANT EXCEPTION: Departmental shirts or any attire specifically tied to an individual program (e.g., IT, HTM, and SHS) are not permitted for this celebration. Please ensure you wear a general, non-departmental STI shirt or a standard uniform top to comply with the event dress code. Thank you for your cooperation in making this a unifying and successful tribute to our esteemed educators and staff!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: FRIGHT ICON 2025 REGISTRATION IS NOW OPEN! Are you ready to unleash your spooky side and claim the title of STI's Spooktacular Fright Icon 2025? Show off your most haunting, creative, and jaw-dropping costume this Halloween and own the stage! Date: October 29, 2025, Venue: STI MultiPurpose Hall (302-303). Register now by answering our official Google Form or message the SSC Facebook Page for inquiries. Dare to scare. Be iconic. Be legendary.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Please be guided by the room assignments and important reminders for today's event. Room Assignments: Cinema (Room 101), Attendance (Room 301), Time-In: 11:00 AM - 12:30 PM, Time-Out: 5:00 PM, Fright Icon Contest: Rooms 302-304 (Multipurpose Hall), Department Booths: 401 (ICT), 402 (SHS), 403 (HTM). REMINDERS: Kindly observe the proper dress code. Students wearing revealing outfits will not be allowed to enter the school premises. Let's maintain respect and professionalism while enjoying today's spooky celebration!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Heads up, STIers! In accordance with Proclamation No. 727 issued by Malacañang, please be informed that there will be no classes and no office transactions on October 31, 2025, and November 1, 2025 (All Saints' Day) in observance of these special non-working holidays. Let us take this time to honor and remember our dearly departed. Regular classes and office operations will resume on Monday, November 3, 2025. Stay safe, cherish the break, and enjoy the long weekend!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/No Classes- October 31 & November 1 (All Saints' Day)_1.webp

content: STIers united once again — this time for safety and preparedness! The 2025 Earthquake Drill brought the entire STI community together to strengthen our awareness, teamwork, and readiness in times of emergencies. The drill served as a vital reminder that disaster preparedness is not just a routine — it's a responsibility that can save lives. From the sound of the alarm to the execution of evacuation procedures, every student, faculty, and staff member showed discipline, cooperation, and a strong sense of unity. Through this activity, we continue to promote a culture of safety, awareness, and collective responsibility. Together, we stand strong, prepared, and united!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: The Search for the First-Ever Queen STI 2025 Begins! Are you ready to shine, slay, and own the spotlight? We're looking for confident, fierce, and fabulous contestants to compete for the crown of the first-ever Queen STI 2025 — exclusive only for transgender women and gay students! If you've got the beauty, brains, and charisma to rule the stage, this is your moment to make history! To register, you may approach any SSC Officer or visit the SSC Office. Who will be crowned the first-ever Queen STI 2025? It could be YOU!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Search for Queen STI 2025 - Registration Open.mp4

content: STI TIGI-AY 2025: THE SPIRIT UNLEASHED! The wait is finally over — it's time to reignite the flame of unity, talent, and school pride! This is where strength meets passion, and every STIer shines with excellence. From electrifying competitions to spectacular performances, TIGI-AY 2025 will bring out the best in every heart that beats for STI! The stage is set. The cheers are loud. The spirit is unstoppable. STI TIGI-AY season is coming — are you ready to rise?
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Prepare to be amazed by a vibrant showcase of culture, creativity, and unity! We're excited to announce STI TIGI-AY 2025 with the theme 'Igniting Talents, Showcasing Excellence.' This year's celebration will shine a spotlight on the incredible talents and artistry of our STIers as we come together to celebrate culture, collaboration, and camaraderie. Expect breathtaking performances, colorful presentations, and unforgettable moments that embody true STI pride! Registration is now open! Contact your Department Officer or Coordinator to register. Inquiries are welcome; you may contact any SSC Officer or message us directly.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Congratulations, Maria Ahtisa Manalo, Miss Universe 3rd Runner-Up 2025! 👑🇵🇭
The Supreme Student Council of STI College (SSC–STI Davao) and the entire STI community proudly join the nation in celebrating your historic and inspiring victory on the universe stage! 💙💛
Your elegance, confidence, and pride as a Filipina representative moved millions, proving that true beauty shines from within and carries the heart and hopes of an entire country.
From the STI College Davao Supreme Student Council! ✨

content: IMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT FROM SSC: Good day, STIers! For everyone's information, the Supreme Student Council (SSC) is NOT ALLOWED to collect any form of payment from students. Please be reminded that your respective departments and the SSC are separate working organizations. Any contributions, fees, or payments requested by your department are NOT connected to the SSC, and we are NOT INVOLVED in such collections. We kindly ask everyone to refrain from spreading false or unclear information that may negatively affect the council's name. Rest assured, we strictly follow all bylaws and regulations in everything we do. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation! Let's continue to uphold transparency and teamwork as we look forward to an exciting Intramurals!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Important- SSC Does Not Collect Student Payments_1.webp

content: Welcome Teams! We're beyond excited to kick off STI TIGI-AY 2025! A huge shoutout to the Dragon Vanguard from SHS Department—get ready to bring the heat, unleash your strength, and showcase your incredible skills! Wishing the Dragon Vanguard an unforgettable intramurals filled with teamwork, determination, and fiery competition. Good luck, warriors! Let the games begin!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Welcome Teams! We're excited to have you all join us for STI TIGI-AY 2025! A big shoutout to Pegasus Fury from THM Department—get ready to soar to new heights, showcase your skills, and take the competition by storm! Wishing Pegasus Fury an incredible intramurals filled with teamwork, determination, and unforgettable moments. Good luck, warriors! Let the games begin!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Welcome Teams! We're excited to have you all join us for STI TIGI-AY 2025! A huge shoutout to Phoenix Invictus from ICT Department—get ready to rise stronger from every challenge and set the arena ablaze with your fiery spirit! Wishing Phoenix Invictus an unforgettable intramurals filled with teamwork, determination, and intense competition. Good luck, warriors! Let the games begin!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Christmas has arrived at STI! Our three departments are once again showcasing their unity, creativity, and holiday spirit through this year's Parol Making Contest. Each parol is proudly crafted using recycled and reusable materials—proving that imagination shines even brighter when paired with sustainability. Let's support our participants as they transform simple, discarded items into meaningful symbols of light and hope. Which department will illuminate the season with the brightest and most innovative parol? Stay tuned and let the holiday glow begin!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Our TikTok Dance Competition featuring the catchy STI Tigi-ay music is officially ON! Bring your energy, creativity, and school spirit as you vibe to the beat and showcase your best dance moves. Let's make this challenge loud, fun, and unforgettable! For registration or submission of your entry, you may message the SSC Facebook Page. Who will own the spotlight? Let the rhythm decide!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Good luck STIers in your exams! No worries too much ha, your STI family is cheering for you. You worked hard all semester — now trust yourself, breathe, and answer with confidence. Kaya kayo nah! Best of luck, mga pasadong students!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Good Luck STIers in Your Exams!.webp

content: ANNOUNCEMENT FROM SSC - CLEARANCE SIGNING: Good day, STIers! Please be informed that SSC Clearance Signing will not start before December 11, which is also the last day of Intramurals. However, if you know that you have absences or were late in the following events (Talent Search, Spooktacular Event, Intramurals Day 1, Intramurals Day 3), you will be required to donate ₱50 worth of school supplies for each day you were absent or late. These school supplies will be used for our upcoming Outreach Programs. Required School Supplies per ₱50 Set: 1 Notebook, 1 Crayola (small pack), 1 Ballpen, 1 Pencil, 1 Sharpener, 1 Plastic Envelope. Reminder: If you missed two past events, you must provide two sets of the required supplies. Thank you for your cooperation and continued support for our community efforts!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Get ready, STIers—Intramurals Day 1 is on! The action begins on December 9 at 1PM at the STI Campus, and we'll be live-streaming all matches so you can follow the excitement wherever you are!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Please be guided by the Do's and Don'ts of Magsaysay Park. Let's maintain cleanliness, safety, and order as we enjoy this public space. Thank you for your cooperation.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: D-DAY is here! The wait is over. The cheers grow louder. The spirit burns brighter. Today, we rise, we compete, and we carry the pride of STI with every move. Give your all, play with heart—Tigi-Ay 2025 starts NOW!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: DAY 1 RESULTS ARE IN! Tigi-ayyyyy pa rin! Our athletes came in strong, fought hard, and delivered an explosive start to TIGI-AY 2025! From major activities like Queen STI, CODM, MLBB, and Cheer Dances, to minor activities such as Board Games, Mindgames, Larong Pinoy, and Creative Challenges—STIers showed unmatched energy and teamwork across every event! Swipe to see our Champion, 2nd Place, and 3rd Place teams who dominated today's games and proved what true STI spirit looks like!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: INITIAL TALLY IS OUT! Day 1 pa lang pero ramdam na ang init ng laban! Here's the current leaderboard based on today's game results — but anything can still change! Teams, keep the momentum. Supporters, keep the energy. TIGI-AY 2025 is just getting started!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: DAY 2 RESULTS ARE HERE! Tigi-ayyyy, STI! Day 2 came in hotter, louder, and more intense as our athletes pushed their limits and delivered another round of solid wins for TIGI-AY 2025! From high-energy court battles to strategic mind games and creative showcases, STIers proved once again that grit, passion, and teamwork run in our blood! Swipe to see today's Champion, 2nd Place, and 3rd Place teams who stood out, dominated their events, and showed the true meaning of STI excellence!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: FINAL TALLY — DAYS 1 TO 3: The results are in, STIers! After three days of intense competition, teamwork, and unstoppable energy, here are your official Intramurals Champions: OVERALL CHAMPION: Pegasus Fury (THM Department), 1ST RUNNER-UP: Phoenix Invictus (ICT Department), 2ND RUNNER-UP: Dragon Vanguard (SHS Department). Congratulations to all departments for giving your best and showing true Tigi-Ay spirit! Win or lose, every cheer, every play, and every moment made this intramurals unforgettable.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: ANNOUNCEMENT: CLEARANCE SIGNING SCHEDULE - The SSC will officially start signing clearances on Monday to Wednesday — December 15 to 17, 2025, from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM. Please prepare your requirements and have your forms ready to avoid delays. The next clearance signing will be scheduled on the second week of January. Have a good sem break, everyone! For any concerns, feel free to message the SSC page.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: All wrapped up in Christmas cheer! From the SSC family to yours, may this season be filled with joy, laughter, and moments that matter.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Another year older, another year leading with purpose.
Happy Birthday to our SSC Senator—keep inspiring and shining ✨
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Happy 22nd Birthday to our SSC Senator!.webp

content:
Honoring the one who leads with purpose and integrity.
Cheers to our SSC Senate President—happy birthday 🎉
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Happy New Year, STIers! Wishing you a year full of prosperity and happiness this year 2026 from SSC Fam.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: ANNOUNCEMENT: Please be informed that the clearance signing will be conducted every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday, from 10:30 AM to 2:00 PM only. Kindly note that the room assignment will be announced later (TBA), as it will depend on room availability on the said dates. Further updates will be posted once the room has been finalized. We encourage everyone to follow the given schedule and wait for further announcements. Thank you for your cooperation.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Heads Up STIers! Enrollment starts on Monday! For the Transferees and Old students, please be informed of the enrollment process for the 2nd Semester of AY 2025-2026. Schedules of Enrollment for Old students: SHS - January 5-17, 2026 (Grade 11 & 12), TERTIARY - January 5-10, 2026 (1st & 2nd Year), January 12-17, 2026 (3rd & 4th Year). Class starts on January 19, 2026.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: One semester. Countless memories. The first semester was a journey filled with learning, laughter, challenges, and victories—both inside and outside the classroom. From academic activities and campus programs to events that brought us together as one community, every moment reflected the passion, dedication, and teamwork of our students and organizers. Each event became an opportunity to grow, build confidence, and create lasting connections. As we look back on these highlights, we celebrate not just what we accomplished, but the memories we shared and the experiences that shaped us this semester. Here's a recap of the moments that made our first semester truly unforgettable!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Appreciating the dedication behind every detail.
Happy birthday to our SSC Secretary 🎂
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Byaheng isang sem na lang… another year na naman of pagod, puyat, at pangarap. Sa bawat late night, bawat breakdown, at bawat pagdududa sa sarili, pinili pa rin nating magpatuloy. Hindi man araw-araw strong, pero araw-araw lumalaban. Konti na lang, kakayanin pa — para sa mga pangarap na matagal na nating hinahawakan. 🤍✨
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: Countdown is REAL ⏳ Back to school in 3 days! Let's gooo!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio
image: assets/images/annoucements/Countdown is REAL ⏳ Back to school in 3 days! Let's gooo!.webp

content: The SSC website is now open to all students. Access the list of SSC events, view the official Intramurals tally, and get to know the SSC officers. The website is accessible on Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile devices.

content: 2 days na lang, STIers! 📖 Bakasyon is waving goodbye, syllabus is waving hello. Ready na ba?

content:
1 Day Left!📚
STIers, it's almost time to head back to campus.
New semester, new goals, new chances to do better.
See you tomorrow!⏳

content:
Back to school just got better 🎒✨
Enjoy free ice cream, journals, ballpens, candies, and other school supplies.
Join the games and get a chance to win exciting prizes!
Limited stocks only—see you tomorrow at 10:00 AM at the Multipurpose Hall!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Welcome back, STIers!
The countdown is officially over and the Second Semester begins today.
As we step back into our classrooms and routines, may this term be filled with focus, growth, and small wins that lead to bigger achievements.
Let's show up, stay motivated, and make this semester one to remember.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Behind every announcement and captured moment is dedication and heart.
Happy 18th Birthday to our amazing SSC PIO 📸
Cheers to your debut and brighter years ahead! ✨🦋

image: assets/images/annoucements/Happy 18th Birthday to our SSC PIO!.webp

content:
Happy Birthday, Sir Kenz! 🎉🥳
Best wishes to our new SSC SAO as you celebrate your special day. We’re excited for this new chapter and grateful for the guidance you bring to the SSC and the student body. Wishing you a year of success and meaningful milestones ahead.
 Family SAO
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: This February 13, ValentaSTIc made hearts smile and moments extra special. 💕 From sweet activities to genuine laughter, the campus was filled with kilig vibes and unforgettable memories with friends. Love was definitely felt—everywhere. ✨
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content: This is truly inspiring! 🌟 Your journey as a working student and leader reminds us that challenges are just stepping stones to success. We’re proud to have you leading and representing STI College Davao. 💙
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
Make your Valentastic Day extra special with a movie break 💕🍿
Join us this February 13 at our Cinema Booth in Rooms 101–104 and enjoy a relaxing space to unwind, laugh, and create memories with your fellow STIers.
Because some moments are better shared on the big screen.
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
📢 ANNOUNCEMENT
STI College Davao follows the City Government’s announcement on the suspension of classes at all levels from February 5–6, 2026.
Students who are already on campus are advised to go home immediately.
📌 Online synchronous classes will be conducted on February 5 and 6, 2026 via MS Teams, following the regular class schedules.
Please check your eLMS or wait for your teacher’s MS Teams invite.
Stay safe, STIers!
author: Cherry Jane Villasencio

content:
An organic encounter awaits this ValentaSTIc February 13✨
A story where hearts meet naturally, smiles come effortlessly, and simple moments turn into unforgettable memories.
Celebrate a day of genuine connections, sweet surprises, and love that grows in the most organic way — all captured beautifully through this special film. 🌿💗
